title: CinematicVideo
description: Cinematics (free version) transforms your Minecraft experience by allowing you to create and play cinematic scenes in an easy way.
body:
The Cinematics mod transforms your Minecraft experience by allowing you to easily and professionally create and play in-game cinematics. With it, you can:

Play music and videos: Supports local files or external links, so your cinematics have the perfect soundtrack or intro videos.

Local and server support: Your content can be played both in your personal world and on servers, facilitating shared experiences with your friends or players.

Versatile use: Supports playback via links, offering the flexibility to integrate any multimedia content without the need for large file storage.
